# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create AWS CloudFormation template for SQS queue and SNS topic setup. Define queue with message retention and visibility timeout. Set up SNS topic for pub/sub messaging. Configure queue policy to allow message operations. This is for our serverless event processing architecture.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent sqs policy too permissive.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: sqs_policy_too_permissive

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Secure SQS Queue and SNS Topic setup for serverless event processing architecture

Parameters:
  EnvironmentName:
    Type: String
    Default: production
    AllowedValues:
      - development
      - staging
      - production
    Description: Environment name for resource tagging

  MessageRetentionPeriodSeconds:
    Type: Number
    Default: 345600
    MinValue: 60
    MaxValue: 1209600
    Description: Message retention period in seconds (default 4 days)

  VisibilityTimeoutSeconds:
    Type: Number
    Default: 300
    MinValue: 0
    MaxValue: 43200
    Description: Visibility timeout in seconds (default 5 minutes)

  MaxReceiveCount:
    Type: Number
    Default: 3
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 10
    Description: Max receive count before sending to DLQ

Resources:
  EventProcessingDeadLetterQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-event-processing-dlq'
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600
      SqsManagedSseEnabled: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: dead-letter-queue

  EventProcessingQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-event-processing-queue'
      MessageRetentionPeriod: !Ref MessageRetentionPeriodSeconds
      VisibilityTimeout: !Ref VisibilityTimeoutSeconds
      SqsManagedSseEnabled: true
      RedrivePolicy:
        deadLetterTargetArn: !GetAtt EventProcessingDeadLetterQueue.Arn
        maxReceiveCount: !Ref MaxReceiveCount
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: event-processing

  EventNotificationTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-event-notification-topic'
      KmsMasterKeyId: alias/aws/sns
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: event-notification

  SNSTopicPolicy:
    Type: AWS::SNS::TopicPolicy
    Properties:
      Topics:
        - !Ref EventNotificationTopic
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowAccountPublish
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Ref AWS::AccountId
            Action:
              - sns:Publish
            Resource: !Ref EventNotificationTopic
          - Sid: AllowAccountManagement
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Ref AWS::AccountId
            Action:
              - sns:Subscribe
              - sns:GetTopicAttributes
              - sns:ListSubscriptionsByTopic
            Resource: !Ref EventNotificationTopic
          - Sid: DenyInsecureTransport
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action:
              - sns:Publish
            Resource: !Ref EventNotificationTopic
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:SecureTransport: 'false'

  EventProcessingQueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref EventProcessingQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowSNSToSendMessages
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sns.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - sqs:SendMessage
            Resource: !GetAtt EventProcessingQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              ArnEquals:
                aws:SourceArn: !Ref EventNotificationTopic
          - Sid: AllowAccountConsumeMessages
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Ref AWS::AccountId
            Action:
              - sqs:ReceiveMessage
              - sqs:DeleteMessage
              - sqs:GetQueueAttributes
              - sqs:ChangeMessageVisibility
            Resource: !GetAtt EventProcessingQueue.Arn
          - Sid: DenyInsecureTransport
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action:
              - sqs:*
            Resource: !GetAtt EventProcessingQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:SecureTransport: 'false'

  DeadLetterQueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref EventProcessingDeadLetterQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowRedriveFromMainQueue
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Ref AWS::AccountId
            Action:
              - sqs:SendMessage
              - sqs:ReceiveMessage
              - sqs:DeleteMessage
              - sqs:GetQueueAttributes
            Resource: !GetAtt EventProcessingDeadLetterQueue.Arn
          - Sid: DenyInsecureTransport
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action:
              - sqs:*
            Resource: !GetAtt EventProcessingDeadLetterQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:SecureTransport: 'false'

  SNSToSQSSubscription:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Properties:
      TopicArn: !Ref EventNotificationTopic
      Protocol: sqs
      Endpoint: !GetAtt EventProcessingQueue.Arn
      RawMessageDelivery: true

Outputs:
  QueueURL:
    Description: URL of the SQS event processing queue
    Value: !Ref EventProcessingQueue
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-EventProcessingQueueURL'

  QueueArn:
    Description: ARN of the SQS event processing queue
    Value: !GetAtt EventProcessingQueue.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-EventProcessingQueueArn'

  DeadLetterQueueURL:
    Description: URL of the dead letter queue
    Value: !Ref EventProcessingDeadLetterQueue
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-EventProcessingDLQURL'

  DeadLetterQueueArn:
    Description: ARN of the dead letter queue
    Value: !GetAtt EventProcessingDeadLetterQueue.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-EventProcessingDLQArn'

  TopicArn:
    Description: ARN of the SNS event notification topic
    Value: !Ref EventNotificationTopic
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-EventNotificationTopicArn'
